시편 109:1.content: God of my praise, don’t remain silent,

시편 109:2.content: for they have opened the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of deceit against me. They have spoken to me with a lying tongue.

시편 109:3.content: They have also surrounded me with words of hatred, and fought against me without a cause.

시편 109:4.content: In return for my love, they are my adversaries; but I am in prayer.

시편 109:5.content: They have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

시편 109:6.content: Set a wicked man over him. Let an adversary stand at his right hand.

시편 109:7.content: When he is judged, let him come out guilty. Let his prayer be turned into sin.

시편 109:8.content: Let his days be few. Let another take his office.

시편 109:9.content: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

시편 109:10.content: Let his children be wandering beggars. Let them be sought from their ruins.

시편 109:11.content: Let the creditor seize all that he has. Let strangers plunder the fruit of his labor.

시편 109:12.content: Let there be no one to extend kindness to him, neither let there be anyone to have pity on his fatherless children.

시편 109:13.content: Let his posterity be cut off. In the generation following let their name be blotted out.

시편 109:14.content: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered by Yahweh. Don’t let the sin of his mother be blotted out.

시편 109:15.content: Let them be before Yahweh continually, that he may cut off their memory from the earth;

시편 109:16.content: because he didn’t remember to show kindness, but persecuted the poor and needy man, the broken in heart, to kill them.

시편 109:17.content: Yes, he loved cursing, and it came to him. He didn’t delight in blessing, and it was far from him.

시편 109:18.content: He clothed himself also with cursing as with his garment. It came into his inward parts like water, like oil into his bones.

시편 109:19.content: Let it be to him as the clothing with which he covers himself, for the belt that is always around him.

시편 109:20.content: This is the reward of my adversaries from Yahweh, of those who speak evil against my soul.

시편 109:21.content: But deal with me, Yahweh the Lord, for your name’s sake, because your loving kindness is good, deliver me;

시편 109:22.content: for I am poor and needy. My heart is wounded within me.

시편 109:23.content: I fade away like an evening shadow. I am shaken off like a locust.

시편 109:24.content: My knees are weak through fasting. My body is thin and lacks fat.

시편 109:25.content: I have also become a reproach to them. When they see me, they shake their head.

시편 109:26.content: Help me, Yahweh, my God. Save me according to your loving kindness;

시편 109:27.content: that they may know that this is your hand; that you, Yahweh, have done it.

시편 109:28.content: They may curse, but you bless. When they arise, they will be shamed, but your servant shall rejoice.

시편 109:29.content: Let my adversaries be clothed with dishonor. Let them cover themselves with their own shame as with a robe.

시편 109:30.content: I will give great thanks to Yahweh with my mouth. Yes, I will praise him among the multitude.

시편 109:31.content: For he will stand at the right hand of the needy, to save him from those who judge his soul.
